sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Embrace the divine energy of wisdom, wealth, and protection with the 4-Face Pyrite Buddha. This unique creation beautifully merges spiritual symbolism with the prosperity-attracting power of authentic Pyrite crystals. The four serene faces of Buddha represent mindfulness, enlightenment, and clarity from different perspectives, reminding us to stay grounded while seeing life with wisdom and balance. 

Known as the “Crystal of Wealth,” Pyrite energizes your surroundings with abundance, financial growth, and protection from negativity. Together, they create a powerful aura that transforms any space into a sanctuary of peace, prosperity, and positivity.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
The 4-Face Pyrite Buddha is more than a decorative piece – it is a symbol of higher guidance and energy balance.

Three Faces of Buddha: Signify mindfulness, inner wisdom, and spiritual awakening from multiple perspectives.

Pyrite Crystal Power: Known as the “Crystal of Wealth,” Pyrite enhances prosperity, abundance, and shields against negative energies.

Protective Aura: Creates harmony in your surroundings while helping in clarity of decisions and peaceful living.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text: ✡ Pyrite – Known as Fool’s Gold, Pyrite forms deep inside the earth where iron and sulfur come together under the right conditions. Sometimes, even nature’s tiny bacteria help create this sparkling crystal. It’s admired for its shine and energy that attracts positivity, abundance, and confidence.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Pyrite: Attracts wealth, success, and shields from negativity.

Purpose: Ideal for home, office, or meditation spaces to enhance positivity and harmony.
